channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Noisy manhole cover in the centre of gloucester street outside numbers 10 - 14, 1st April
item.description:
Noisy manhole cover in the centre of gloucester street outside numbers 10 - 14
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Gloucester Street, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Really noisy manhole cover keeping us all awake at night and a nuisance during the day., 1st April
item.description:
The manhole cover(s) in the middle of gloucester street outside numbers 22-26.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Gloucester Street, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: House is shaking from this pothouse, 1st April
item.description:
In the road outside 337 Swindon Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 335, Swindon Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 1st April
item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Small but deep pothole outside Baker and graze on the Suffolk road, 1st April
item.description:
Right outside the step of baker and graze there is a small pothole but deep enough to cause me to fall and sprain my ankle badly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Suffolk Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Give way sign rotated to not face cars and bike bath sign fallen down pole and protruding end on into pathway, 1st April
item.description:
The give way sign is for the bike path crossing the access road into the Amazon warehouse, the bike path sign is on the opposite side of both the road and the junction (next to the wooden fence of the hotel)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnwood Link Road, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)
